---
applyTo: "src/App.tsx,src/index.css"
description: "Use the frontend-design skill for landing/auth UI work while preserving the existing approved design language."
---

For changes related to landing page and auth page UI:
- Use the `frontend-design` skill as the design-quality workflow.
- Keep the current approved visual design direction intact unless the user explicitly asks for a redesign.
- Prioritize responsive refinements, alignment fixes, spacing, and accessibility improvements over aesthetic overhauls.
- Do not replace established brand assets, color direction, or layout hierarchy without explicit user request.
